source_truth_rule: GitHub origin/main remains canonical. This review branch preserves candidates until human-gated promotion.
mission: Replace fixture proof with production readback for Swateyes, Fleyes, and Ender apoptosis.

required_inputs.swateyes: A real action payload from Medulla or Fastify before execution.

pass_conditions: Swateyes classifies a destructive production-bound payload as FRACTURE before execution.
Fleyes produces frictional_heat.json from production inputs, not fixtures.
Ender apoptosis runs on production circulation.db and logs any dry_run deletion or NO_ACTION without touching docs/ unless operator_signature exists.
All outputs have file paths, byte counts, and SHA256 hashes.
fail_conditions: Fixture output is described as production proof.
Any docs/ artifact is deleted without operator_signature.
Any cache row is deleted without filtration_log.txt recording it.
Any quarantined packet is deleted instead of listed for manual Operator review.
do_not: Do not promote this branch to canonical without production proof.
Do not call no-input NO_FRICTION_DETECTED a healthy organism.
